description: User reviews the initial list of 4 opportunities on the Explore page with filters applied.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible with filter chips for Survey, Video Call, and Mobile Only.

description: User clicks the 'x' on the 'Mobile Only' filter chip to remove it.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the filter section and targets the Mobile Only chip; the opportunity count updates to 5.

description: The filter chips are removed and the task list refreshes with new content.
frame_description: The filter bar and opportunity count disappear, and the task list updates to show different cards.

description: User examines the updated list of short tasks and surveys after the UI state change.
frame_description: The user remains on the Explore page, looking at the newly displayed task cards.
